name: Snow Tale
author: Poki
description: Snow Tale is a is a platform game where you embark on a journey through a winter land. You play as our penguin hero who runs and jumps through the snowy hills, throws snowballs to incapacitate his enemies, and defeats ingenious bosses! You have to worry about obstacles such as spikes, boulders, and fireballs. But you also have cool stuff to pick up like gems and delicious ice cream. Are you ready for a chill adventure? Then help our poor penguin fella go back home! How to play Snow Tale? Move - A/D or Left/Right arrows Jump - W or Upward arrow (tap twice to double-jump) Throw snowball - Space bar Ground pound - Jump, then press S or the Downward arrow key Who created Snow Tale? Snow Tale was created by Neutronized, and ported to HTML5 by AwayFL. Play their other racing game on Poki: Picnic Penguin , Magic Bridge , lost-yeti, Drop Wizard Tower and Slime Pizza How can I play Snow Tale for free? You can play Snow Tale for free on Poki. Can I play Snow Tale on mobile devices and desktop? Snow Tale can only be played on your computer for now.
